/usr/bin/avr-gcc -mmcu=atmega4808 -DF_CPU=20000000UL -Os -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -mmcu=atmega4808 -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/atecc_provision.dir/src/provision_atecc.c.obj CMakeFiles/atecc_provision.dir/src/mcu.c.obj CMakeFiles/atecc_provision.dir/src/status_led.c.obj CMakeFiles/atecc_provision.dir/src/twi0.c.obj CMakeFiles/atecc_provision.dir/src/drivers/atecc608a.c.obj -o atecc_provision
